import React from "react"; import AdminLayout from "../../components/AdminLayout"; function Dashboard() { const companies = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("companies")) || []; const activeCompanies = companies.filter((c) => c.status === "Active").length; const inactiveCompanies = companies.filter((c) => c.status !== "Active").length; return (

); } export default Dashboard;
